'''Shawti''' was an [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]] where the [[Desilijic/Legends|Desilijic]] [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidic]] bred [[Klatooinian/Legends|Klatooinian]] slaves, such as [[Umpass-stay/Legends|Umpass-stay]].
